SGDEV Digital Hub I am Shubhomoy, a self-taught, independent developer building fast, open-source software, retro games, and modern web tools. Below is the complete directory of my official web ecosystem, creative portfolios, and developer profiles. Explore, connect, and stay updated with my latest open-source creations! Main Web & Core Contacts Main Website: Explore my official web apps, standalone tools, and live projects directly at shubhomoy.dnc.su. Contact Email: For support, official inquiries, or feedback regarding my applications, feel free to reach out anytime at s07114587@gmail.com. Creative & UI/UX Portfolios DeviantArt: Check out my visual concepts, user interface (UI) designs, and creative artwork gallery at deviantart.com/sgdev111. Behance: Dive deeper into my professional UI/UX project layouts and web architecture designs at behance.net/sgdev1. Developer Communities & Socials Dev.to: Read my latest tech blogs, development journeys, and behind-the-scenes articles on coding at dev.to/sgdev_sg_dev. Reddit: Join my discussions, share feedback, and interact with me directly in the tech community via my official handle at reddit.com/user/sgdev111. Best Regards, SGDEV Team‍
